tutors.name: Alessandra
tutors.quote: The brain has about 10^14 synapses and we only live for about 10^9 seconds.

tutors.name: Michele
tutors.quote: Our intelligence is what makes us human, and AI is an extension of that quality.

tutors.name: Antonello
tutors.quote: AI could be the most transformative technology in human history.

tutors.name: Vito
tutors.quote: We are in a mobile-first, cloud-first world.

programmers.name: Alessandro
programmers.quote: Talk is cheap. Show me the code.

programmers.name: Andrea
programmers.role: Creator of C & Co-creator of Unix
programmers.quote: UNIX is basically a simple operating system, but you have to be a genius to understand the simplicity.

programmers.name: Andrea
programmers.quote: Premature optimization is the root of all evil.

programmers.name: Angelo
programmers.quote: Code is read much more often than it is written.

programmers.name: Antonella
programmers.quote: There are only two kinds of languages: the ones people complain about and the ones nobody uses.

programmers.name: Antonio
programmers.quote: The cloud is the new normal for enterprise IT.

programmers.name: Aspreno Lapo
programmers.quote: Every company in every industry is becoming a technology company.

programmers.name: Christian
programmers.quote: Everything fails, all the time. Design for failure.

programmers.name: Davide
programmers.quote: Hybrid cloud is where every enterprise will operate.

programmers.name: Edoardo
programmers.quote: Good design is not just what looks good. It also needs to perform, convert, astonish.

programmers.name: Enrico Pasquale
programmers.quote: The home should adapt to you, not the other way around.

programmers.name: Fabio
programmers.quote: The smart home is about making everyday life simpler and more efficient.

programmers.name: Fabio
programmers.quote: Interoperability is the key to a truly connected home.

programmers.name: Federico
programmers.quote: Your home automation should work locally, privately, and without the cloud.

programmers.name: Francesco
programmers.quote: We don't override the models. If you start doing that, you get in trouble.

programmers.name: Francesco
programmers.quote: The market is beatable, but only with math and discipline.

programmers.name: Francesco
programmers.quote: Markets look a lot less efficient from the banks of the Hudson than the banks of the Charles.

programmers.name: Gianvito
programmers.quote: Risk is the uncertainty of future outcomes.

programmers.name: Giorgio
programmers.quote: Mathematics is the language the market speaks if you listen carefully enough.

programmers.name: Giuseppe
programmers.quote: Scaling is not just a feature, it's a mindset.

programmers.name: Leonardo
programmers.quote: If you do it twice, automate it.

programmers.name: Matteo
programmers.quote: Finding the bug is half the fun; fixing it is the other half.

programmers.name: Michele
programmers.quote: Frontend, backend, it's all just data in motion.

programmers.name: Nico
programmers.quote: The hardware is the limit, the code is the bridge.

programmers.name: Nicolò
programmers.quote: Security is a process, not a product.

programmers.name: GHERARD
programmers.quote: Data is the new oil, and SQL is the drill.

programmers.name: ALESSANDRO
programmers.quote: User experience is the soul of the application.
